definitions.text: A sensation, pleasant or unpleasant, detected by inhaling air (or, the case of water-breathing animals, water) carrying airborne molecules of a substance.
examples: I love the smell of fresh bread.

definitions.text: A conclusion or intuition that a situation is wrong, more complex than it seems, or otherwise inappropriate.
To sense a smell or smells.
examples: Smell the milk and tell me whether it's gone off.

definitions.text: To detect or perceive; often with out.
